name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Password Policy Discovery (Unix)
notes:
This Building Block detects when a password policy discovery action is performed.

By default, this Building block is watching the following files:
/etc/login.defs
/etc/pam.d/common-password
/etc/pam.d/system-auth
/etc/security/pwquality.conf
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Password Policy Discovery (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Attempt
when the event matches Command Arguments (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches LOWER("Command Arguments") MATCHES '.*\/etc/(pam.d/(common-password|system-auth)|security/pwquality.conf|login.defs).*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Password Policy Discovery (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Attempt
AND when the event matches Command Arguments (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command Arguments") MATCHES '.*\/etc/(pam.d/(common-password|system-auth)|security/pwquality.conf|login.defs).*' AQL filter query
